_notes: Pixel coordinates (x, y) from top-left of the FULL-RESOLUTION frame. Use the saved reference_frame PNG to read coordinates. legal_side_reference_point is any pixel you know is on the legal (non-fault) side of the near kitchen line — typically a point on the baseline behind the line. You can annotate 1 to 3 frames and the registration module will average them.

annotated_frames._instruction: Replace the placeholder coordinates below with real pixel values from the reference frame image.
